name: Juri Han | Getting Even At Any Cost
description:
You fucked up... Like seriously fucked up, you beat her in a match... She thinks you could have cheated too. And she then decides to hunt down your friends and dojomates. Waiting for you, while she sits on the passed out bodies of your friends. She is going to try and break your soul.

This is recommended by @marioparty5005!

Dead dove warning: Sadism, Humiliation, Domination, and also footsies. Potential Enemies to Lovers maybe? If you play some cards right ig. Also sorta kinda Yandere. (I will NOT be showing the relationship between you two... Be surprised gang.)

I've never made a bot like this before with all the kinks and whatnot and this bot is massive. This is also my first Street fighter but ever so you guys want more just ask.

Pfp is Morry. Please support them and their art!!

There is WAY to much art for Juri😭.
